summary: Seventy external capability candidates are registered. Four remain live for the next supervised Frankly OS pass (2 installs pending marketplace verification, 2 reduced-scope pilots); four are closed as already adapted (2026-07-01).

lanes.label: Audit / pilot
lanes.gate: Dependency and script audit before promotion
